prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `fd096ab6`.
codex_response:
Implemented `fd096ab6` as: take the largest diagonal-connected object as the reference template, then complete every other non-background color partition into one or more translated copies of that same template. The Sonnet hint was discarded because it described symmetry/reflection rather than template completion; the Opus hint matched the official examples and was used as the starting hypothesis. The generator stays close to the task family by using the official sparse template families, blue background, yellow reference template, scattered partial copies, and occasional repeated partial colors. No new DSL primitive was added.

Validation passed with `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task fd096ab6` (`3/3` official examples), and I built `1000` verified examples with the shared builder. I also opened the final preview sheet and the distribution looks on-family.
